strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with direct TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB usage at Optilyz and re:cinq
Active AI agent development and MCP framework contributions in current role — direct match to a listed required skill
Deep, demonstrated testing culture: TDD advocate, authored testing frameworks, ran TDD/Selenium workshops
concerns: No Nest.js or Vitest mentioned anywhere in the resume
No Kotlin experience listed; Java appears only in older embedded and tooling contexts
No PostgreSQL or Playwright exposure documented
response.justification: Bogdan comfortably clears the seniority bar with 15+ years of polyglot full-stack work, and his current role at re:cinq maps directly onto the job's core stack (TypeScript, Node.js) and its AI-agent requirement. Optilyz adds React, AWS CDK, and MongoDB production credibility. The gaps — Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest, Playwright — are real but narrow: Nest.js is an incremental step from his Node.js depth, Kotlin is a secondary concern, and his proven testing instincts make Vitest/Playwright adoption low-risk. Overall a high-confidence fit.
